jobDescription: We are enfore Enfore was founded in 2009 as Number Four AG by Marco Boerries to re-imagine how small businesses utilize technology. We have built an open business platform to develop solutions that help 200+ million small businesses stay competitive in a connected world. Our bold vision is simple: every small business should enjoy similar efficiencies and scalability that are typically only available to large enterprises. Our headquarters is located in Berlin, Germany, with an additional office in Hamburg, Germany. As a Software Engineer Java Script at enfore, you will join a fast learning environment where you can extend and build upon your skills and interests. You will be part of our international, experienced and fun engineering team responsible for developing and delivering our Business App, covering all aspects of a local business:  Sales, reservation, payment processing, inventory management, purchasing, order fulfillment, and logistics. Together we aim to build the best POS application, changing the way small businesses do their business. Your role: You will ensure reliability, scalability, and efficiency and make the API easy to use and understand Design and implement critical high-performance, large-scale services, and libraries You will help us design, develop and deliver scalable and highly-performant services for our world-changing products Take ownership of feature development and releases Solve complex performance problems and architectural challenges You will work in an automated, agile and test-driven environment Requirements: Experience with modern Java Script or Typescript libraries and tools such as React JS or Node.js Strong Object Oriented design skills and experience with design patterns and software architecture Experience with test-driven development and professional development processes You are able to communicate and implement your design ideas Enthusiastic about working in multidisciplinary teams Desire to work with and share new and innovative ideas, constantly expanding your knowledge Ability to work in a fast-paced, multi-national and entrepreneurial environment Solid English communication skills Extra Qualifiers we’d like to see: Build and release management, continuous integration M. Sc in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field Experience in HTTP Networking, Java Script/ ECMAScript 2015 or HTML5/ CSS3 Solid German language skills
